appearance.title: General
appearance.launchAtStartupDesc: Automatically launch BAIclaw when you log in

web3.title: Web3
web3.vaultUnlockSubtitle: A wallet exists in ~/.openclaw/agent-wallet-baiclaw (e.g. from the CLI) but this app has not stored its master password yet. Enter the same master password to unlock; it will be saved with the OS keychain like a wallet created in the app.
web3.storagePathHint: Wallet directory: {{path}} — use the same path in the CLI (e.g. agent-wallet list -d "{{path}}") or set AGENT_WALLET_DIR. Folder name is .openclaw/agent-wallet-baiclaw (two "l").
web3.vaultTopologyIncompleteBanner: Vault is initialized (master.json + kv-password) but wallets_config.json has no wallet entries — CLI shows "No wallets configured" and there is no secret_default_secure.json. The key import did not finish. Use **Create wallet** again with the **same master password** to complete registration.
web3.bankOfAiKeyWarning: Add your BANK OF AI API key before creating a wallet.
web3.subtitle: Agent wallets for on-chain signing (EVM, local encrypted keys)
web3.emptyDesc: Create a wallet to get an EVM address stored securely on this device.
web3.dialogDesc: A new key is generated locally and encrypted. Copy the address after creation; the private key never leaves this machine.
web3.deleteConfirmMessage: Wallets, keys, and configurations will be deleted and cannot be recovered. Are you sure you want to delete them?

wizard.title: Create AgentWallet
wizard.bindingSkippedToast: Could not verify binding with BANK OF AI online; format checks passed.

step0.subtitle: Agent Wallet is a locally secure Web3 wallet built for AI agents.
step0.body:
BAIclaw supports importing the private key associated with your current BANK OF AI API-Key to create an Agent Wallet
By configuring Agent Wallet, BAIclaw can enable self-recharge, transfers, token swaps, liquidity pool management, and access to x402 protocol paid resources and other web3 skills.

step1.label: Bind BANK OF AI login wallet private key
step1.howTo: How to get your private key
step1.errorMismatch: The address derived from this private key does not match the TRON address linked to your BANK OF AI API key.
step1.errorTronOnly: Only TRON addresses are supported for now.
step1.errorNoApiKey: Could not read your BANK OF AI API key for this account.

step2.policyHint: At least 8 characters, including uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and a special character.
step2.mismatchHint: The two passwords do not match.
step2.warningBullet1: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and a special character.
step2.warningBullet2: Keep your master password safe. BAIclaw does not back it up; it cannot be recovered if lost.

step3.intro: Congratulations! You've unlocked many of BAIclaw's Web3 skills. You can try asking:
step3.example1: How much TRX can I get for 100 USDT on SunSwap right now?
step3.example2: What is my BANK OF AI account balance?
step3.example3: Show my recent BANK OF AI orders.
step3.example4: Top up BANK OF AI with 1 USDT.
step3.learnSkills: Learn more about BANK OF AI Web3 skills

errors.walletExists: A wallet already exists. Remove it before creating a new one.
errors.persistFailed: The wallet was not fully written to disk (check space and permissions), please try again.
errors.runtimePasswordFailed: Wallet created, but setting AGENT_WALLET_BAICLAW_PASSWORD / Gateway restart failed

aiProviders.title: AI Providers
aiProviders.description: Configure your AI model providers and API keys

overview.title: Provider Accounts
overview.description: A summary of the provider accounts and models currently configured.

empty.title: No providers configured
empty.desc: Add an AI provider to start using BAIclaw

dialog.title: Add AI Provider
dialog.desc: Configure a new AI model provider
dialog.apiKeyConfigured: An API key is already stored for this provider.
dialog.apiKeyMissing: No API key is stored for this provider yet.
dialog.apiKeyStored: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.
dialog.replaceApiKeyHelp: Leave this field empty if you want to keep the currently stored API key.
dialog.bankofaiModelsHint: BANK OF AI can load the available model list from your current Base URL and API key.
dialog.bankofaiModelsLoading: Loading available BANK OF AI models...
dialog.bankofaiModelsMissingConfig: Enter both Base URL and API key before loading models.
dialog.bankofaiModelsFailed: Failed to load BANK OF AI models: {{error}}
dialog.fallbackModelIdsHelp: One model ID per line. These models use the current provider config before falling back to other providers.
dialog.noFallbackOptions: Add another provider first to use it as a fallback target.

agentWalletBound.title: AgentWallet is linked
agentWalletBound.message: This API key is already linked to an AgentWallet. To change it, delete the AgentWallet in Settings → Web3 first.
agentWalletBound.message2: This API key is already linked to an AgentWallet. To delete it, delete the AgentWallet in Settings → Web3 first.

toast.minimaxConflict: Cannot add both MiniMax (Global) and MiniMax (CN) providers.

oauth.loginPrompt: This provider requires signing in via your browser.
oauth.browserFlowUnavailable: Browser OAuth is not wired for this provider yet.
oauth.step2: Open the login page in your browser.
oauth.step3: Paste the code to approve access.

gateway.title: Gateway
gateway.proxyDesc: Route Electron and Gateway traffic through your local proxy client.
gateway.proxyServerHelp: The default proxy for all requests. Bare host:port values default to HTTP.
gateway.proxyHttpServerHelp: Advanced override for HTTP requests. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyHttpsServerHelp: Advanced override for HTTPS requests. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyAllServerHelp: Advanced fallback for SOCKS-capable clients and protocols such as Telegram. Leave blank to use Proxy Server.
gateway.proxyBypassHelp: Semicolon, comma, or newline separated hosts that should connect directly.
gateway.proxyRestartNote: Saving reapplies Electron networking and restarts the Gateway immediately.

updates.title: Updates

status.check: Check for updates to get the latest features

updates.help: When auto-update is enabled, updates are downloaded and installed automatically.

advanced.title: Advanced

transport.label: Gateway Transport Preference
transport.desc: Choose how renderer requests gateway RPC: WebSocket, HTTP proxy, or IPC fallback.

advanced.telemetryDesc: Local diagnostics are available for debugging, but product telemetry is not exposed to end users.

developer.title: Developer
developer.consoleDesc: Access the native OpenClaw management interface
developer.consoleNote: Opens the Control UI with gateway token injected
developer.gatewayTokenDesc: Paste this into Control UI settings if prompted
developer.cliDesc: Copy a command to run OpenClaw without modifying PATH.
developer.doctorDesc: Run `openclaw doctor --json` and inspect the raw diagnostic output.
developer.doctorFixRunFailed: Failed to run OpenClaw doctor fix
developer.wsDiagnosticDesc: Temporarily enable WS/HTTP fallback chain for gateway RPC debugging.
developer.installDetail: This will create ~/.local/bin/openclaw. Ensure ~/.local/bin is on your PATH if you want to run it globally.
